title: available_commands_update - Send slash commands to client
description:
Send list of available slash commands to client after session creation:
- Define list of available commands (plan, test, web, etc)
- Include name, description, and optional input hints
- Send session/update with sessionUpdate: available_commands_update

Tests: unit, integration, edge cases.

title: session/cancel - Cancel ongoing prompts
description:
Handle the session/cancel notification:
- Cancel any ongoing language model requests
- Cancel any in-progress tool executions
- Mark all non-finished tool calls as cancelled
- Send any final tool call updates before responding
- Return session/prompt response with appropriate stop reason

Tests: unit, integration, edge cases. Pattern: spawn agent, send requests, verify responses.

title: session/request_permission - Tool permissions
description:
Request permission from client before executing sensitive tools:
- Define which tools need permission (destructive ops)
- Send session/request_permission request with options
- Await response: allow-once, reject-once, allow-always, reject-always, cancelled
- Proceed or skip based on outcome

Tests: unit, integration, edge cases.

title: plan notifications - Execution plan tracking
description:
Report agent execution plan to client:
- Send session/update with sessionUpdate: plan and entries array
- Each entry: content, priority (high/medium/low), status (pending/in_progress/completed/failed)
- Update entries as tasks complete/fail

Tests: unit, integration, edge cases.

title: session/list - List existing sessions
description:
Implement session/list method:
- Maintain list of sessions internally
- Support optional cursor for pagination
- Support optional pageSize limit
- Return sessions array and nextCursor if more available

Tests: unit, integration, edge cases.

title: terminal notifications - Live terminal output
description:
Report terminal created during tool execution:
- Track terminal IDs for spawned processes
- Send terminal notification with terminalId and title
- Send terminal close notification when done

Tests: unit, integration, edge cases.

title: authenticate - Real auth flow
description:
Implement real authentication instead of current no-op:
- Define auth methods supported in initialize response
- Implement proper validation in authenticate method
- Store auth state per session

Tests: unit, integration, edge cases.

title: session/update_metadata - Session metadata
description:
Track and update session metadata:
- name: Session name
- description: Session description
- lastActive: Last activity timestamp

Tests: unit, integration, edge cases.

title: session/set_context_variables - Context variables
description:
Allow client to set context variables (key-value pairs) for agent:
- Add storage for context variables
- Implement session/set_context_variables handler
- Pass variables to agent when prompting

Tests: unit, integration, edge cases.

title: Permission response handling
description:
Handle permission responses from client:
- Track always-allow/always-reject rules
- Apply stored rules automatically for permission-requiring tools

Tests: unit, integration, edge cases.

title: HTTP transport support for MCP
description:
Add HTTP transport support for MCP servers:
- Accept HTTP connection parameters
- Support SSE for server-sent events

Tests: unit, integration, edge cases.

title: Custom capability advertising
description:
Advertise custom capabilities via _meta field:
- Add _meta field to agentCapabilities
- Define custom extension capabilities

Tests: unit, integration, edge cases.

title: session/resume - Complete state restoration
description:
Implement full session resumption:
- Serialize complete session state (history, tool calls, metadata)
- Restore all state on session/resume
- Handle missing/invalid sessions gracefully

Tests: unit, integration, edge cases.

title: _meta trace context - OpenTelemetry
description:
Support W3C trace context in _meta field:
- Extract traceparent from requests
- Propagate trace context in responses

Tests: unit, integration, edge cases.
